title: scutellaria heterophylla
intro: Scutellaria heterophylla, also known as variegated skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria heterophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Scutellaria heterophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, making it accessible for various herbal preparations.
